sources.title: Auto-Data F45 220i DCT specification entry
sources.note: Reputable secondary source used for the F45 220i DCT numeric final-drive and top-gear pair after official BMW sources confirmed transmission type only.

sources.title: Carfolio F45 220i Active Tourer specification entry
sources.note: Independent secondary cross-check for the F45 220i DCT ratio pair used in the exact-row override.

sources.title: Carfolio A4 B8 2.0 TDI quattro manual specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary manual row for the pre-facelift A4 2.0 TDI quattro sedan showing AWD, 6-speed manual transmission, top gear 0.63, final drive 4.49, and 225/55 R16 tires.

sources.title: Auto-Data A4 B8 2.0 TDI quattro manual specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary pre-facelift A4 2.0 TDI quattro sedan entry used to cross-check AWD, 6-speed manual transmission, and 225/55 R16 baseline tires for the manual row.

sources.title: Carfolio A4 B8 2.0 TDI quattro S tronic specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary facelift A4 2.0 TDI quattro sedan row showing AWD, 7-speed S tronic, top gear 0.39, final drive 4.27, and 225/50 R17 tires.

sources.title: Auto-Data A4 B8 2.0 TDI quattro S tronic specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary facelift A4 2.0 TDI quattro sedan entry used to cross-check AWD, 7-speed S tronic transmission, and 225/55 R16 tires for the S tronic row.

sources.title: Auto-Data A5 B8 2.0 TFSI quattro S tronic specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2008-2011 A5 Coupe 2.0 TFSI quattro S tronic entry used to document AWD, 7-speed S tronic transmission, and 225/50 R17 tires for the broad B8 coupe row.

sources.title: Auto-Data A5 B8 2.0 TFSI quattro Tiptronic specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2009-2011 A5 Coupe 2.0 TFSI quattro Tiptronic entry used to document AWD, Tiptronic transmission, and 245/40 R18 plus 255/35 R19 tire fitments for the broad B8 coupe row.

sources.title: Carfolio A4 B8 2.0 TFSI quattro manual specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2013 A4 2.0 TFSI quattro sedan page used to cross-check AWD and 6-speed manual transmission for the broad B8 row.

sources.title: Auto-Data A4 B8 2.0 TFSI quattro manual specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2008-2011 A4 2.0 TFSI 211 hp quattro sedan entry used to cross-check AWD and 6-speed manual transmission for the broad B8 row.

sources.title: Carfolio A4 B8 2.0 TFSI quattro S tronic specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2013 A4 2.0 TFSI quattro S-Tronic sedan page used to cross-check AWD and 7-speed automatic transmission for the broad B8 row.

sources.title: Auto-Data A4 B8 2.0 TFSI quattro S tronic specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2012-2015 facelift A4 2.0 TFSI 211 hp quattro S tronic sedan entry used to cross-check AWD and 7-speed S tronic transmission for the broad B8 row.

sources.title: Auto-Data A4 B8 2.0 TFSI quattro Tiptronic specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2008-2011 A4 2.0 TFSI 211 hp quattro Tiptronic sedan entry used to document that the pre-facelift row is Tiptronic with 6 gears, which conflicts with the broad-row 8-speed ZF8HP mapping.

sources.title: Auto-Data A5 B8 3.0 TDI quattro Tiptronic specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2007-2011 A5 Coupe 3.0 TDI 240 hp quattro Tiptronic entry used to document that the pre-facelift row is Tiptronic with 6 gears, which conflicts with the broad-row 8-speed ZF8HP mapping.

sources.title: Ultimate Specs A5 B8 3.0 TDI quattro tiptronic specification entry
sources.note: Independent secondary 2007-2011 A5 Coupe 3.0 TDI Quattro tiptronic DPF page used to corroborate the pre-facelift Tiptronic identity while the broad-row 8-speed mapping remains unresolved.

sources.title: Carfolio A4 B8 3.0 TDI quattro manual specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2012 A4 3.0 TDI quattro sedan page used to cross-check AWD and 6-speed manual transmission for the broad B8 row.

sources.title: Auto-Data A4 B8 3.0 TDI quattro manual specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2007-2011 A4 3.0 TDI 240 hp quattro sedan entry used to cross-check AWD and 6-speed manual transmission for the broad B8 row.

sources.title: Carfolio A4 B8 3.0 TDI quattro S tronic specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2015 A4 3.0 TDI quattro S-Tronic sedan page used to cross-check AWD and 7-speed automatic transmission for the broad B8 row.

sources.title: Auto-Data A4 B8 3.0 TDI quattro S tronic specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2011-2015 facelift A4 3.0 TDI 245 hp quattro S tronic sedan entry used to cross-check AWD and 7-speed S tronic transmission for the broad B8 row.

sources.title: Auto-Data A4 B8 3.0 TDI quattro Tiptronic specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2007-2011 A4 3.0 TDI 240 hp quattro Tiptronic sedan entry used to document that the pre-facelift row is Tiptronic with 6 gears, which conflicts with the broad-row 8-speed ZF8HP mapping.

sources.title: Carfolio A4 B8 3.0 TFSI quattro S tronic specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2012 A4 3.0 TFSI quattro S-Tronic sedan page used to cross-check AWD and 7-speed automatic transmission for the broad B8 row.

sources.title: Auto-Data A4 B8 3.0 TFSI quattro S tronic specification entry
sources.note: Exact secondary 2012-2014 facelift A4 3.0 TFSI 272 hp quattro S tronic sedan entry used to cross-check AWD and 7-speed S tronic transmission for the broad B8 row.
